item.title: Lilly vs. Novo Weight Loss Drugs
item.description:
• Summary: Recent studies highlight differences between Eli Lilly's tirzepatide and Novo Nordisk's semaglutide in weight loss efficacy and body composition. A preprint suggests that semaglutide may offer an advantage in preserving lean muscle mass compared to tirzepatide, which could lead to greater lean muscle loss. This data adds nuance to the competitive landscape of GLP-1-based therapies for obesity and metabolic disorders.
  • MoAs: Tirzepatide: Dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist; Semaglutide: GLP-1 receptor agonist.
  • Sources: Biospace, Endpoints News
